title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: The storm destroyed hundreds of homes.
example.secondSentence: Hundreds of homes (1) _________ by the storm.

questions.firstSentence: You are not allowed to take photos inside the gallery.
No writer in the country is more popular than she is.
questions.secondSentence: She is (1) _________ writer in the country.

questions.firstSentence: She was too nervous to speak in public.
questions.secondSentence: She wasn't (1) _________ to speak in public.

questions.firstSentence: He admitted that he had broken the window.
She was in the habit of keeping a diary.
She asked him, 'When does the exhibition close?'
